channel.title: An Orthodox Christian priest's almost daily pastoral journal by Priest Seraphim Holland
channel.description: An Orthodox Christian priest's almost daily pastoral journal by Priest Seraphim Holland. Commentary on scripture, prayers, services, spiritual topics, catechesis, homilies, and whatever else comes to mind.

item.description: Holy Father Nicholas, pray to God for us! Summing things up in the Akathist to St Nicholas Understanding prayer to the Saints. Oct 24/ Nov 6 2009 22nd Friday after Pentecost

item.title: The Great Litany. The Litany of Peace. A short description.
item.description: The Great Litany. The Litany of Peace. A short introduction. With a great painting of a deacon. Oct 22/Nov4 2009 22nd Wednesday after Pentecost. Holy Equal to the Apostle Abercius. Also in format FORMAT:WORD

title.title: The Great Litany. The Litany of Peace. A short description.

item.description: That we may be delivered from all tribulation, wrath, and necessity… Thoughts on a petition in the Great Ectenia, the Litany of Peace Oct 21/Nov 3 2009 22nd Tuesday after Pentecost. Monk Hilarion the Great. Also in format FORMAT:WORD

item.description: 5th Monday of Pascha, May 5/18 2009 The Stones raised up as children to Abraham. Christian worship is Jewish! Also in format: FORMAT:WORD

item.title: Why do we pray facing East? Why does the priest not face the people when he prays?
item.description: 4th Saturday of Pascha. May 3/16 2009 Why do we pray facing East? Why does the priest not face the people when he prays? Orthodox Christian worship is prayer, not entertainment. Some people smile too much. The Domino Theory. St. John of Damascus, Book IV, chapter 12. Also in format: FORMAT:WORD

item.title: 3rd Friday of Pascha. "Your fathers did eat manna in the wilderness, and are dead"
item.description: 3rd Friday of Pascha, Apr 25/May 8 2009 Scripture is blunt. Slogans. Jesus wept. Even right brains can get things done. Also in format: FORMAT:WORD

item.title: The pleasure of little things, fasting, rutabagas, olive oil
item.description: Friday of Thomas Week 2009 The pleasure of little things. Pascha season fasting rules. Difference in services in the Paschal season. Repetition is necessary. The safe way to sauté with Olive oil. Rutabagas are great. A recipe that has no name. Also in format: FORMAT:WORD

item.title: 2009-04-02 ns (3/20) 5th Thursday of Great Lent.
item.description: 2009-04-02 ns (3/20) 5th Thursday of Great Lent. Prison Ministry Hackberry trees Serendipity Just showing up

item.title: After the Great Canon service. 5th Wednesday of Great Lent 2009.
item.description: 2009-03-02 ns. (3/19) 5th Wednesday of Great Lent 2009. After the Great Canon service. A happy heart. Fasting creates simple pleasures. Lentil Curry, & cooking oil and onions. "Yummy" Black Cherry soda. The Theme of the Great Canon. St Mary of Egypt. Irony.
